title: The Courtyard House

details.description: Designed around a central open-to-sky double-height courtyard, this home blends outdoor elements with internal spaces. The clean lines, natural light, and organic wooden textures create an oasis of calm within the busy urban environment. The home features passive cooling systems and green architectural techniques.

floorPlan:
<svg viewBox="0 0 800 500" class="vector-floor-plan">
        <style>
          .wall { stroke: var(--text-color); stroke-width: 5; fill: none; stroke-linecap: round; }
          .thin-wall { stroke: var(--text-color); stroke-width: 2.5; fill: none; opacity: 0.7; }
          .door { stroke: var(--primary-color); stroke-width: 2.5; fill: none; }
          .room-label { fill: var(--text-color); font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; text-anchor: middle; }
          .room-dims { fill: var(--text-muted); font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; text-anchor: middle; }
          .furniture { fill: rgba(255, 149, 0, 0.08); stroke: rgba(255, 149, 0, 0.4); stroke-width: 1.5; }
        </style>
        <!-- Outer Wall Boundary -->
        <rect x="50" y="50" width="700" height="400" rx="10" class="wall" />
        
        <!-- Room Dividers -->
        <!-- Courtyard in Center -->
        <rect x="300" y="150" width="200" height="200" rx="8" class="wall" style="stroke-dasharray: 8 5; fill: rgba(0,0,0,0.03);" />
        
        <!-- Living Room Left -->
        <line x1="300" y1="50" x2="300" y2="350" class="wall" />
        <!-- Master Bedroom Right -->
        <line x1="500" y1="50" x2="500" y2="350" class="wall" />
        <!-- Kitchen Bottom -->
        <line x1="300" y1="350" x2="500" y2="350" class="wall" />
        <line x1="400" y1="350" x2="400" y2="450" class="wall" />
        
        <!-- Furniture Blocks -->
        <!-- Sofa in Living -->
        <rect x="80" y="150" width="40" height="120" rx="4" class="furniture" />
        <rect x="130" y="190" width="80" height="40" rx="4" class="furniture" />
        
        <!-- Bed in Master Bed -->
        <rect x="580" y="120" width="120" height="100" rx="6" class="furniture" />
        
        <!-- Dining Table in Courtyard -->
        <rect x="360" y="220" width="80" height="60" rx="4" class="furniture" />
        <circle cx="345" cy="250" r="8" class="furniture" />
        <circle cx="455" cy="250" r="8" class="furniture" />
        <circle cx="400" cy="205" r="8" class="furniture" />
        <circle cx="400" cy="295" r="8" class="furniture" />
        
        <!-- Doors -->
        <!-- Main Entry -->
        <path d="M 50 400 A 50 50 0 0 1 100 450" class="door" />
        <!-- Bedroom Entry -->
        <path d="M 500 300 A 40 40 0 0 1 540 340" class="door" />
        
        <!-- Labels -->
        <text x="175" y="200" class="room-label">LIVING ROOM</text>
        <text x="175" y="220" class="room-dims">16'0" x 24'0"</text>
        
        <text x="400" y="180" class="room-label" style="fill: var(--primary-color);">COURTYARD</text>
        <text x="400" y="198" class="room-dims" style="fill: var(--primary-color);">12'0" x 12'0" (Open to Sky)</text>
        
        <text x="625" y="200" class="room-label">MASTER BEDROOM</text>
        <text x="625" y="220" class="room-dims">18'0" x 14'0"</text>
        
        <text x="350" y="400" class="room-label">KITCHEN</text>
        <text x="350" y="418" class="room-dims">10'0" x 12'0"</text>
        
        <text x="450" y="400" class="room-label">FOYER</text>
        <text x="450" y="418" class="room-dims">8'0" x 12'0"</text>
      </svg>

title: The Emerald Penthouse

details.description: A luxury high-rise apartment overlooking the Arabian Sea, themed around Emerald Green, Brass, and rich Walnut woods. The architecture features wide floor-to-ceiling glass fronts, custom crafted metal screens, and statement lighting pieces. An private plunge pool and bar section makes it the ultimate entertainment lounge.

floorPlan:
<svg viewBox="0 0 800 500" class="vector-floor-plan">
        <rect x="50" y="50" width="700" height="400" rx="10" class="wall" />
        <!-- Room Dividers -->
        <line x1="400" y1="50" x2="400" y2="450" class="wall" />
        <line x1="400" y1="250" x2="750" y2="250" class="wall" />
        <line x1="50" y1="200" x2="400" y2="200" class="wall" />
        
        <!-- Balcony Deck Bottom -->
        <rect x="50" y="50" width="350" height="60" style="fill: rgba(255, 149, 0, 0.05); stroke: var(--text-color); stroke-width: 1.5; stroke-dasharray: 4 4;" />
        
        <!-- Text Labels -->
        <text x="225" y="150" class="room-label">SEA-VIEW LIVING DECK</text>
        <text x="225" y="170" class="room-dims">22'0" x 30'0"</text>
        
        <text x="225" y="320" class="room-label">LOUNGE & COCKTAIL BAR</text>
        <text x="225" y="340" class="room-dims">22'0" x 16'0"</text>
        
        <text x="575" y="150" class="room-label">MASTER SUITE</text>
        <text x="575" y="170" class="room-dims">18'0" x 18'0"</text>
        
        <text x="575" y="350" class="room-label">GUEST SUITE & SPA BATH</text>
        <text x="575" y="370" class="room-dims">18'0" x 16'0"</text>
        
        <!-- Furniture Mock -->
        <rect x="500" y="100" width="100" height="90" rx="4" class="furniture" />
        <circle cx="225" cy="300" r="30" class="furniture" />
      </svg>

title: The Terracotta Villa

details.costBreakdown: ₹70 Lakhs Clay-brick Structure + ₹25 Lakhs Custom Millwork
details.description: An eco-conscious countryside retreat crafted using locally sourced exposed red clay bricks, terracotta tile roofing, and reclaimed teak wood. Designed around the concept of passive ventilation, the high sloping ceilings and large louvers keep the interior cool, eliminating the need for intensive air conditioning.

materials.material: Reused Old Colonial Mansion Teak Shutters

floorPlan:
<svg viewBox="0 0 800 500" class="vector-floor-plan">
        <rect x="50" y="50" width="700" height="400" rx="10" class="wall" />

        <!-- Pillars -->
        <circle cx="100" cy="400" r="8" fill="var(--primary-color)" />
        <circle cx="300" cy="400" r="8" fill="var(--primary-color)" />
        <circle cx="500" cy="400" r="8" fill="var(--primary-color)" />
        <circle cx="700" cy="400" r="8" fill="var(--primary-color)" />
        
        <!-- Text Labels -->

        <text x="150" y="180" class="room-label">BEDROOM 1</text>
        <text x="150" y="200" class="room-dims">12'0" x 18'0"</text>
        
        <text x="650" y="180" class="room-label">BEDROOM 2</text>
        <text x="650" y="200" class="room-dims">12'0" x 18'0"</text>
        
        <text x="400" y="380" class="room-label" style="fill: var(--primary-color);">TRADITIONAL FRONT VERANDAH</text>

title: The Slate Studio

details.costBreakdown: ₹35 Lakhs Civil modifications + ₹30 Lakhs Premium Fitouts
details.description: An industrial loft featuring raw concrete ceilings, exposed black metal conduits, micro-concrete floors, and hand-rubbed leather upholstery. Double height metal framing partition panels create visual boundaries without compromising on the expansive, open sense of space.

materials.material: Black Powder-Coated MS Pipes with Fluted Glass
Cognac Tan Italian Grain Leather Chesterfield Sofa

details.costBreakdown: ₹45 Lakhs complete internal joinery, panelling, and soft finishes

title: The Courtyard Blueprint Design

details.costBreakdown: Vector Architectural Blueprint specification layout document
details.description: Premium open-to-sky courtyard architectural plans, illustrating partition structures, load-bearing concrete layouts, ventilation louvers, and interior furniture placements mapped for maximum daylight penetration.

details.costBreakdown: ₹55 Lakhs Styling, Bespoke Furniture & Lighting selection
details.description: Japandi interior styling fusing clean Japanese minimalism with warm Scandinavian functionality. Raw paper pendant lamps, low-slung oak bed structures, light beige textures, and hand-woven tatami rugs define this beautiful styling template.

materials.material: Akari Washi Paper Floor and Pendant Lamps

details.costBreakdown: Full coverage of modern tropical coastal architecture
details.description: Featured spread for the Monsoon 2026 issue of Urban Builds Magazine. Spotlighting a seaside villa in Goa with concrete cantilevers, rich local hardwood decks, and dynamic floor-to-ceiling glass sliding bays.

materials.material: Reclaimed Teak decking boards oiled matte
